2026-0568
2026-06-11PSCorrections and Conditional Release ActAppointment of a part-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of CanadaAppointment of Ellen Filippelli of Oka, Quebec, to be a part-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of three years, effective October 26, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a part-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada
precis: Appointment of Ellen Filippelli of Oka, Quebec, to be a part-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of three years, effective October 26, 2026.
